name: AMW Django ERP - Automated Development Pipeline
description: Automated multi-agent workflow for AMW Django ERP development following Constitution Orchestrator Law

stages.name: PLANNING
stages.output: Detailed execution plan with task breakdown

stages.name: CREATE_BRANCH
stages.output: Git feature branch created locally and on remote
stages.rule: Check if branch exists. If yes, skip creation. If no, create with name: Feature-{Name} or Fix-{Name}

stages.name: PUSH_TO_BRANCH
stages.output: Committed and pushed to feature branch
stages.rule: Only push code that passed testing and review

stages.name: MERGE_TO_MASTER
stages.output: PR created, branch merged to master
stages.branch_cleanup: Delete feature branch after successful merge

error_at_testing.description: If testing fails, go back to Planning for fix plan, then do FULL CYCLE
error_at_testing.flow: UNIT_TESTING_fail → PLANNING → CREATE_BRANCH → CODING → UNIT_TESTING → REVIEWING → DOCUMENTATION → PUSH_TO_BRANCH → HUMAN_APPROVAL → MERGE_TO_MASTER

error_at_review.description: If review rejects, go back to Planning for fix plan, then do FULL CYCLE
error_at_review.flow: REVIEWING_reject → PLANNING → CREATE_BRANCH → CODING → UNIT_TESTING → REVIEWING → DOCUMENTATION → PUSH_TO_BRANCH → HUMAN_APPROVAL → MERGE_TO_MASTER

new_feature.description: If new feature needed, go back to Planning, then do FULL CYCLE
new_feature.flow: REVIEWING (new feature) → PLANNING → CREATE_BRANCH → CODING → UNIT_TESTING → REVIEWING → DOCUMENTATION → PUSH_TO_BRANCH → HUMAN_APPROVAL → MERGE_TO_MASTER

iteration_limits.meaning: Complete workflow can run 5 times max, then human intervention

key_rules: Always complete full workflow stages in order
On error/reject: go back to Stage 1 (Planning)
Only push correct, tested code to branch
Max 5 cycles, then escalate to human
